brand.name: Velora
brand.description: Mobile-first AI-powered mental health platform for Gen Z.
brand.archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury) & Archetype 3 (Gen Z Soft) Hybrid - Premium Dark Gen Z

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-blue-600 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
buttons.glass: bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.1] text-white backdrop-blur-md rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/[0.1] transition-all
buttons.icon: h-12 w-12 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.1] hover:bg-white/[0.1]

mood_tracker.container: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/[0.08] rounded-3xl p-6
mood_tracker.emoji_button: text-4xl p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-110 grayscale hover:grayscale-0
mood_tracker.emoji_active: scale-110 grayscale-0 bg-white/[0.1] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] ring-1 ring-white/[0.2]

breathing_circle.base: w-64 h-64 rounded-full border border-purple-500/30 flex items-center justify-center relative
breathing_circle.animated_ring: absolute inset-0 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-blue-500 opacity-20 blur-xl

ai_chat.user_bubble: bg-purple-600/80 text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-4 backdrop-blur-sm max-w-[85%]
ai_chat.ai_bubble: bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.05] text-slate-200 rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-4 backdrop-blur-sm max-w-[85%]

gamification.badge: h-16 w-16 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.1] flex items-center justify-center text-3xl shadow-lg

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract dark purple blue gradient blur - use as deep ambient background, heavily blurred

lifestyle_meditation.description: Person meditating in silhouette - use for meditation sessions or landing page features
Woman in dark lighting with subtle neon glow - use for AI companion hero or testimonial

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install framer-motion for smooth micro-interactions, especially the breathing circle.
Use pure Tailwind for the Landing Page layout, heavily utilizing the 'crystal_glass' surface style on top of a dark '#05030A' background.
Use Shadcn UI for complex dashboard components, but override their default borders and backgrounds to match the dark glassmorphism aesthetic.
For the breathing exercise, create a component with Framer Motion that cycles through scale and opacity changes, matching durations for Box, 4-7-8, etc.
For the mood tracker, use an emoji grid with a grayscale effect by default, switching to full color and adding a glow on selection.
Ensure the gamification UI (XP bar, streaks) uses vibrant gradients to stand out against the dark background.
